description: A clean agency statistics card on a deep navy-blue subtly textured (wood-grain-like) background. In the upper-left is the round white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (eagle with shield, ringed by the text 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'), beside three lines of white serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin dark-red horizontal rule runs full-width beneath the header. Centered below in large bold white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with a smaller serif subheading 'January 26, 2025'. The key statistics are stacked and centered in large white serif numerals: '956 Arrests' and '554 Detainers Lodged'. At the very bottom, centered in italic white serif, is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. The design is restrained, official and template-based (consistent DHS/ICE branding across a daily series, no photographs or illustration). Messaging technique: broadcasting daily enforcement metrics to project momentum, scale and effectiveness of the immigration crackdown, using authoritative government branding and large numerals to signal aggressive action and promise-keeping. Target audience: the general public and media, demonstrating the administration delivering visibly on immigration-enforcement pledges.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement | Enforcement Update | January 26, 2025 | 956 Arrests | 554 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
